---
title: "Pi Day Part 2"
image: ../img/piday2.png
categories:
    - Advanced HS
    - Math
    - Trigonometry
    - Precalculus
    - Javascript
    - Pi day
---

If you completed [the Pi day activity](piday1.qmd) and were surprised at how long it took to calculate the digits of π there is good news! There is a better way to calculate the digits of Pi!

## Links to Activity

* [Instructions for Pi Day Part 2](https://www.asc.ohio-state.edu/orban.14/math_coding/pi_day2/index.html)
* [Pi Day Part 2 Code Editor](https://editor.p5js.org/ChrisOrban/sketches/D0lYGw_s)
